case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CHOY, CARLEN M.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, CARLEN M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOY, CARLEN M. DEFT'S WAIVED UNTIMELY SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, CARLEN M.
UNTIMELY POS; DEFT CARLEN M. CHOY WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 20 DAYS NOTICE ON SUBSTITUTION OF SERVICE IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY.
